title: Custom frontmatter (extension seam)
$comment: Empty by default — this is where promptless.ai-specific frontmatter requirements go, so docmeta.config.yaml never needs to change. Example: to require an `owner` field on every page, add "required": ["owner"] and "properties": { "owner": { "type": "string", "description": "Team that owns this page." } }. If you extend Astro's zod schema in src/content.config.ts (docsSchema({ extend })), mirror the same fields here so violations fail in CI, not at build time.
